command: try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:9222/json' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; $pages = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "CDP OK - Pages: $($pages.Count)"; foreach($p in $pages){ Write-Output "  title=$($p.title) url=$($p.url.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(80,$p.url.Length)))" } } catch { Write-Output "CDP FAILED: $_" }
description: فحص CDP عبر PowerShell HTTP مباشرة
